title: HID
description: The HID dataset is a neuroimaging collection of intracranial electroencephalography (iEEG) recordings curated and formatted according to BIDS standards (version 1.8.0). This dataset is derived from OpenNeuro dataset ds004851 (DOI: 10.18112/openneuro.ds004851.v2.1.0) and serves as a resource for neuroscience research on electrophysiological brain activity. The dataset is made available under the CC0 license to facilitate open science and data sharing. It contains iEEG recordings with associated metadata documenting electrode placement, recording parameters, sampling rates, and brain regions of interest.
methods_description: Intracranial electroencephalography (iEEG) recordings were acquired and organized according to BIDS standards (version 1.8.0). Data organization and formatting was performed using bids-matlab-tools (version 8.0). The dataset is derived from OpenNeuro dataset ds004851 (DOI: 10.18112/openneuro.ds004851.v2.1.0). Electrode placement locations were documented in the anatomical derivatives. Recording parameters including sampling rates, filter settings, and amplifier specifications are provided in the JSON sidecars accompanying each recording file. Detailed methodology, participant information, data collection procedures, file organization, and usage guidelines are documented in the dataset README and BIDS metadata files.
